name: Data Obfuscation in C2 Communications
description: Detects suspicious data obfuscation patterns in outbound network traffic
query:
// Detect data obfuscation in C2 traffic
// Trigger on high-entropy DNS queries indicating data encoding
events from dns
where query_name matches "^[a-z0-9]{30,}\."
  and query_type = "TXT"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 10
within 300 seconds
